name: lex
oneLiner: Personal AI companion stack with Docker deployment profiles, host-edge routing, and tool integrations for daily assistant workflows.
impact: Moves from local prototype to repeatable, domain-backed assistant operations.
bullets: Defined dev/live Compose profiles and shared edge-network deployment path.
Documented environment contract for LLM, ComfyUI, sessions, and user identity headers.
Added smoke and walkthrough verification scripts for startup validation.
proof: Run `docker compose up -d` with `scripts/verify_walkthrough.sh` from the repo guide.

name: friday
oneLiner: Modular assistant backend that keeps chat online while memory and multimodal services degrade safely.
impact: Improves production reliability for agent workflows under partial outages.
bullets: Implemented chat, async agent runs, and gated tool execution APIs.
Integrated provider-driven memory rehydrate, staging, and confirmation flows.
Shipped multi-compose runtime scripts for dev, app, and model modes.

name: muninn
oneLiner: Pluggable memory service for LLM agents with SQLite durability, audit logging, and staged confirmation workflows.
impact: Turns ad-hoc memory writes into traceable, policy-gated memory operations.
bullets: Built namespace-scoped storage for entities, facts, episodes, and preferences.
Implemented FTS, vector, and hybrid retrieval with memory-card rendering.
Added pending-candidate review and confirmation endpoints.
proof: Run `scripts/smoke.sh` and call `/v0/memory/*` endpoints documented in README.

name: OnHand
oneLiner: Intent and inventory platform spanning Android client, enterprise demo stack, and optional vision-evaluation services.
impact: Connects consumer grocery workflows to enterprise operations in one codebase.
bullets: Maintained Compose-based FastAPI, Postgres, and React enterprise demo environment.
Shipped Android setup and instrumentation scripts for device testing.
Included optional vision vLLM service wiring for evaluation workflows.
proof: Run `make up` in `onhand-enterprise-demo` and `make android-check` in the Android app.

name: Null_Signal
oneLiner: Local-first newsroom pipeline that generates dystopian short-form broadcast clips from breaking-news inputs.
impact: Automates repeatable media generation with publish guardrails and run artifacts.
bullets: Built script-driven ingestion, screenwriting, rendering, and export flow.
Added dry-run, dedupe, and kill-switch controls for safe publishing.
Tracked clip-level exports and run manifests for review.
proof: Run `python3 scripts/run_newsroom.py --batch 1 --render --resume` with local env flags.

name: PulseTrade
oneLiner: Trading research stack combining live ingestion, feature pipelines, forecasting services, and policy-driven execution.
impact: Creates a testable path from market data to daily allocation decisions.
bullets: Integrated websocket and API ingestion with Postgres and Timescale storage.
Ran Celery workers, Redis queues, and forecast services in Compose.
Automated nightly backfill, forecasting, and planning jobs through scheduler scripts.
proof: Run `docker compose up -d ingest forecast strategist worker policy api redis db`.

name: MemeTrader
oneLiner: Headless memecoin research engine with deterministic signals, offline backtests, and mock API providers.
impact: Enables strategy iteration without real trading keys or wallet risk.
bullets: Implemented mock-e2e execution mode and provider toggles.
Stored per-run decisions, summaries, and trade artifacts.
Containerized runtime with tests for repeatable local validation.

name: ReadyPlayer1
oneLiner: Agentic playtester framework for deterministic game runs and computer-use validation against interactive apps.
impact: Cuts QA feedback loops with reproducible traces and run reports.
bullets: Built CLI commands for scenario runs, agent profiles, and environment checks.
Generated trace, report, log, and media artifacts per run.
Added controller profile validation for normalized input mapping.

name: Accountant
oneLiner: On-prem accounting assistant stack for document ingest, OCR workflow, human review, and export automation.
impact: Brings sensitive accounting workflows into controlled local infrastructure.
bullets: Delivered FastAPI and Celery backend with upload, process, and export APIs.
Integrated React portal, Traefik routing, and observability services.
Added backup and restore scripts with CI and testing scaffolding.
proof: Run `make dev-up`, `make db-migrate`, and `make seed` from README quickstart.

name: Gauntlet
oneLiner: Competitive coding arena for challenge publishing, submission scoring, and ranked result tracking.
impact: Standardizes challenge evaluation so results stay comparable and auditable.
bullets: Implemented web app, worker runner, and Postgres-backed challenge pipeline.
Added upload limits, runtime caps, and worker safety controls.
Included fixtures and broad test coverage for challenge correctness.
proof: Run `pnpm dev:web`, `pnpm dev:worker`, and the submission smoke test in README.

name: Gauntlet001
oneLiner: Minimal coding challenge package for arena bootstrap and quick validation of solution submission tooling.
impact: Provides a lightweight baseline for challenge authoring and packaging checks.
bullets: Defines challenge prompt and expected behavior in a self-contained repo.
Offers starter structure for solution packaging and execution.
Supports quick sanity checks before larger challenge rollout.
proof: Challenge spec and runnable package entrypoints are documented in README and package.json.

name: subsim
oneLiner: Deterministic audio-first submarine simulation built for rapid gameplay iteration and replayable test runs.
impact: Supports fast tuning cycles with headless smoke, trace generation, and soak testing.
bullets: Implemented fixed-step simulation loop with passive and active sonar behaviors.
Exposed headless, agent, and soak run modes through CLI flags.
Shipped release-build and CI scripts for repeatable packaging and testing.
